authorization_phrase: Authorize s20-d1 combined-universe weekly relative-strength rotation DRAFT-to-diagnostic bundle (Step 3: P1 plan-lock).
da_register_locked_by_reference_to_seal: ALL DA1-DA22 by-reference to SEAL e9ec72f (report_seal e6f801085bb14fc8); NO parameter changes at P1; mechanic byte-identical to s18/s19; M=8 unchanged
edge_not_inherited_note: The combined-basket edge is NOT inherited from s18/s19; re-proven at s20 P6 IS. Selection caveat binding (union includes the known-OOS-good s18 basket -> positive result is weak generalization evidence).
inherited_constraints_block_C6_carried_v: K9_THRESHOLD_INVIOLATE: closed_trades>=100 total; OOS>=50/y; no relaxation. Pre-SEAL K9 turnover MEASURED (signal-only, no P&L, 48-name union) PASSES: IS aggregate 284; OOS 134 (67.2/y) CLEARS the floor; per-fold F1-F5 77/96/81/77/84 (agg 415).

K13_WALK_FORWARD_BINDING (by-ref 52a3b60): >=3/5 fixed pre-committed UNSEARCHED OOS folds positive + aggregate net>0 + K9; P6.7 before P10; VALIDATION not optimization; NO per-fold refit (INVIOLATE; T-FORBID-22). Folds LOCKED at DA22.

FRESH s20 CANDIDATE (NOT a tune/_revN_ of s18 or s19): mechanic byte-identical to the s18/s19 weekly spec; the ONLY change is the universe (48-name union of two pre-committed DR9-passed baskets). s18 (7e6aa36) and s19 (a3aed99) frozen/untouched. M=8 unchanged.

EDGE NOT INHERITED: the combined-basket edge MUST be re-proven from scratch at s20 P6 IS (K1 sharpe>0 AND K2 expectancy>0), P6.7 K13, and P10 OOS. A null/negative result = accepted, informative (breadth did not yield a surviving edge).

SELECTION-BIAS CAVEAT (BINDING interpretation rule): the 48-name union INCLUDES the known-OOS-CONFIRMED s18 basket, so a positive s20 IS/OOS is WEAK fresh-generalization evidence. s20's honest value is the SAMPLE-SIZE (OOS-K9-reachability-via-breadth) question, NOT independent edge generalization. Read all downstream positive results through this caveat.

PURPOSE = SAMPLE-SIZE FIX: broadening the ranking pool to 48 at fixed M=8 raises boundary churn -> more OOS turnover. Pre-SEAL MEASURED OOS 134 (67.2/y) confirms breadth STRUCTURALLY SOLVES the s19 OOS-K9 blocker (s19 was 43.6/y terminal). Binding confirmation with P&L at P10.
RELATIVE-STRENGTH-FIRST-PRINCIPLES (BINDING): weekly cadence; 126-21 ranking signal; top-8 equal-weight; relative-rank exit (no trailing/ATR stop). Identical to s18/s19.
Params L=126 / S=21 / M=8 / R=5(weekly) LOCKED byte-equivalent (identical to s18/s19; NOT tuned, NOT searched). M held at 8 (NOT scaled to 16) -> breadth effect from universe size alone.
DA3 equal-weight 1/M; DA4=B START_CASH 100000; long-only unlevered (DR11 NOT IN CHAIN).

DR10 = v2 AND-conjunction by-ref 78cd22e; thresholds 0.50/0.05 immutable; no_dr_redefinition_post_seal. COUNTER-PRESSURE: more turnover raises cost_drag (~1-3% projected vs <1% parents); DR10-v2 binding at P6.5; REJECT_FAST a more live possibility than the 24-name parents.

split_only CONFIRMED (DA15); reuse the DR9-passed CSVs of BOTH baskets (d86e5d1 + 574fa9e); switching post-SEAL FORBIDDEN; s18 splits (AAPL/NVDA/AMZN/WMT/GOOGL + MRK 1.048) + s19 (NFLX 10:1 + HON 1.061) applied+verified.
48-name COMBINED UNION universe LOCKED (24 s18 + 24 s19; zero overlap); widening/substitution post-SEAL FORBIDDEN (fresh candidate_record_id required).

DR9 data-availability gate PASSED all 48 by sealed results d86e5d1 (s18, 85667ab3238a27b2) + 574fa9e (s19, 0c8e21f240c8b801); cash_equity_data_reuse_byte_equivalent; sha-verified all 48 at the DRAFT measurement.
A7 + K10 + K6 LOAD-BEARING (top-8 of 48 -> broad sector spread, more diversified than the 24-name parents); NOT the risk axis (the relative-momentum edge K1/K2/K13 is).
no_strategy_optimization_authorized: byte-locked s18/s19 params, NOT grid-searched/tuned; K13 fold scheme pre-committed + unsearched; no cadence-tuning; no held-N change.
P6 IS PASS and/or K13 PASS (if reached) do NOT imply READY at OOS/live; 6-gate live-block applies regardless; DIAGNOSTIC_ONLY_NOT_LIVE_GRADE permanent.
